CONTENT.Honours: ŠibenikCroatian Second Football League: 2019–20Dinamo ZagrebCroatian Football League: 2021–22, 2022–23, 2023–24Croatian Football Super Cup: 2023Croatian Cup: 2024
CONTENT.Club career: On 2 July 2024, Bulat joined Standard Liège in Belgium on loan with an option to buy.
CONTENT.Personal life: He is the son of Josip and the nephew of Ivan Bulat, both retired footballers.
CONTENT.External links: Marko Bulat at SoccerwayMarko Bulat at the Croatian Football Federation

SUMMARY: Marko Bulat (Croatian pronunciation: [mâːrko bǔlat]; born 26 September 2001) is a Croatian professional footballer playing as a midfielder for Belgian club Standard Liège on loan from Dinamo Zagreb.
